sql_array: CREATE TABLE employees (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, department VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, department) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'HR'), (2, 'Bob', 'IT'), (3, 'Charlie', 'Finance');
UPDATE employees SET department = 'Marketing' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT department, listagg(name, ', ') AS employee_names FROM employees GROUP BY department;
SELECT listagg(name, ', ') AS all_employees FROM employees;
